purpose: Fetch outcomes and grade NBA/MLB games and player props
agent_notes: Outcomes and grading session on May 30, 2026. Initially matched and attached outcomes to 13 traces from May 28 and May 29. Subsequently, all 7 NBA traces (2 games, 5 props from May 28) were ungraded (deleted outcomes) per USER instruction to base them on tonight's game. 6 MLB game outcomes remain successfully graded. Flagged 49 Celtics@Lakers sandbox test traces from March/April as missing session_id, kind, and league attributes. Flagged 1 older prop trace sandbox-fe2718ac-28d4 as missing game identity context. Flagged NBA first_basket and MLB total_bases prop types as currently unsupported by ESPN box-score parsing. Scored 22 signal-performance rows and generated refreshed MLB Brier/ECE calibration reports in reports/latest.md.

Successfully fetched and attached 13 outcomes (2 NBA games, 6 MLB games, 5 NBA props) for dates 2026-05-28 and 2026-05-29.

Generated refreshed calibration reports for NBA and MLB to reports/latest.md.
